evidence_quotes.quote: when their support ends from the publisher due to the disabling of online features, often leaves the video game unable to be played.
this presents an unfair practice by the video game publishers.
an end-of-life plan to turn support of the video game over to the community (like private servers) would ameliorate the situation.

paragraphs.text: how about you add protections for video games with online components? when their support ends from the publisher due to the disabling of online features, often leaves the video game unable to be played. with these games being purchasable right up to the end date, this presents an unfair practice by the video game publishers. an end-of-life plan to turn support of the video game over to the community (like private servers) would ameliorate the situation.
